# PHIL.020 ? Sophism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** sophism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Teaching rhetoric and virtue for fee; relativism about truth and morality; human measure of all things; persuasive technique

## Application
Recognize contextual nature of claims; adapt to audience and situation; value persuasive skill; pragmatic approach to truth

## Key Values
- Relativism
- Rhetoric
- Contextual truth
- Persuasive skill
